calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for award of post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1,200. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-03-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
